scripts.build:all: nest build gateway && nest build auth && nest build catalog && nest build booking && nest build payment
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:catalog" "npm run start:booking" "npm run start:payment"
scripts.start:e2e: concurrently "cross-env E2E_TEST_MODE=1 GATEWAY_PORT=4100 AUTH_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4101 CATALOG_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4102 BOOKING_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4103 PAYMENT_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4104 FRONTEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 npm run start:gateway" "cross-env E2E_TEST_MODE=1 AUTH_PORT=4101 npm run start:auth" "cross-env E2E_TEST_MODE=1 CATALOG_PORT=4102 npm run start:catalog" "cross-env E2E_TEST_MODE=1 BOOKING_PORT=4103 CATALOG_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4102 npm run start:booking" "cross-env E2E_TEST_MODE=1 PAYMENT_PORT=4104 BOOKING_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4103 npm run start:payment"
